checks.feature: large center hole / bore opening visible (check top view)
checks.notes: Clear circular opening visible at center of top view, appears to be approximately 15mm diameter hub bore
Isometric view shows curved disc body and cylindrical hub tower, overall curved impeller form is present

checks.feature: curved vane/blade features visible (check top view)
checks.notes: Top view shows swept/curved blade profiles radiating from hub, blades appear to have backward-curved geometry
Front view shows stepped profile with raised hub section and flat disc base, vane thickness visible at outer edges
Multiple distinct vane features clearly visible in top view radiating outward from hub
Counting the vanes in the top view, approximately 6 curved vanes are visible, evenly spaced at roughly 60 degrees apart

checks.feature: center bore (~15.0mm) visible as a large circular opening (top view)
checks.notes: Center bore is clearly visible as a white circular opening in top view, size appears consistent with 15mm diameter specification

checks.feature: part appears as a ring/annular shape (top view)
checks.notes: Top view shows annular/disc shape with outer diameter approximately 80mm and inner hub bore, consistent with impeller geometry

issues: Vane curvature could be more pronounced - blades appear somewhat straight in portions
Front view shows relatively thin vane height which may limit hydraulic performance
Hub tower extends significantly above disc plane which may or may not be intentional for shaft coupling
